data.title: Endeavour Silver to Acquire Minera Kolpa for $145 Million
data.description:
Endeavour Silver ( (TSE:EDR) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 1, 2025, Endeavour Silver Corp. announced its agreement to acquire all outstanding shares of Compañia Minera Kolpa S.A. and its main asset, the Huachocolpa Uno Mine, for a total consideration of US$145 million. This transaction is expected to enhance Endeavour’s asset portfolio and strengthen its position in the mining industry. The acquisition will be funded through a mix of cash, shares, and proceeds from a new copper purchase agreement. Additionally, Endeavour plans to raise approximately US$45 million through a bought deal financing to support the transaction. The deal, subject to regulatory approvals, is anticipated to close soon, potentially impacting stakeholders by expanding Endeavour’s mining capabilities and market reach.

More about Endeavour Silver

Endeavour Silver Corp. is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focused on the exploration, development, and production of silver and gold. The company is based in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada, and has a market focus on precious metals.

YTD Price Performance: -6.25%

Average Trading Volume: 9,985,723

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $992.2M

data.title: OKEA ASA Completes Employee Share Purchase Program
data.description:
OKEA ASA ( (DE:3SX) ) has provided an update.

OKEA ASA has completed a significant share purchase program involving 492 employees, including primary insiders, with a total of 1,488,205 shares acquired at an average price of NOK 18.6688 per share. This initiative, amounting to NOK 27.8 million, underscores the company’s commitment to aligning employee interests with corporate growth and stability, potentially enhancing stakeholder confidence.

More about OKEA ASA

OKEA ASA is a prominent operator focusing on mid- and late-life assets on the Norwegian continental shelf. The company is known for its strategy of finding value in areas where others choose to divest, emphasizing growth, value creation, and capital discipline. OKEA is publicly traded on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

YTD Price Performance: 1.02%

Average Trading Volume: 440

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €175.4M

data.title: Xebra Brands’ Shareholder Boosts Stake Amid Landmark Cannabis Deal in Mexico
data.description:
Xebra Brands Ltd. ( (TSE:XBRA) ) just unveiled an update.

Xebra Brands Ltd. has announced that its largest shareholder, David Ross Macias Diaz, has increased his stake in the company, signaling strong confidence in its strategic direction. The company is also exploring a landmark agricultural agreement with Mr. Diaz to cultivate cannabis on his land, marking a significant milestone in Mexico’s cannabis industry by initiating the first federally compliant cannabis agricultural activity, potentially unlocking commercial opportunities across the country.

More about Xebra Brands Ltd.

Xebra Brands Ltd. is a pioneering company in the Mexican cannabis sector, uniquely authorized to import seeds, cultivate, manufacture, and sell cannabis with less than 1% THC in Mexico.

Average Trading Volume: 52,732

data.title: SQM Releases 2024 Consolidated Financial Statements
data.description:
Sociedad Quimica Y Minera SA ( (SQM) ) just unveiled an update.

Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A. released its consolidated financial statements as of December 31, 2024. These statements provide a comprehensive overview of the company’s financial position, including income, cash flows, and changes in equity. The release of these audited financial documents is crucial for stakeholders, as it offers transparency into the company’s financial health and operational performance over the past year, potentially impacting investor confidence and market positioning.

More about Sociedad Quimica Y Minera SA

Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A. (SQM) is a leading company in the chemical and mining industry, primarily focusing on the production of specialty plant nutrition, iodine and derivatives, lithium and derivatives, potassium, and industrial chemicals. The company operates globally with a strong market presence in the production and distribution of these products.

data.title: Redelfi S.p.A. Announces Capital Increase to Support Expansion Plans
data.description:
Redelfi S.p.A. ( (IT:RDF) ) just unveiled an update.

Redelfi S.p.A. has approved a capital increase of nearly 8 million Euros to support its 2025-2029 Industrial Plan, which aims to expand its operations in both the Italian and American markets. The capital increase, which was oversubscribed by leading investors, is intended to strengthen Redelfi’s development pipeline and shareholder base, reflecting a strategic commitment to growth and market expansion.

More about Redelfi S.p.A.

Redelfi S.p.A. is a company leading a group focused on digital and green transitions, emphasizing innovative approaches in products, services, and processes while adhering to ESG principles. In 2023, the group reported a Production Value of 11 million Euros and a Net Result of 3 million Euros, with a cash-negative Net Financial Position of 4.8 million Euros and Net Equity of 25 million Euros.

data.title: Lloyds Banking Group Executes Share Buyback as Part of Capital Strategy
data.description:
Lloyds Banking ( (LYG) ) has issued an update.

On April 3, 2025, Lloyds Banking Group plc announced the purchase of 28,482,165 of its ordinary shares from Morgan Stanley & Co. International plc as part of its ongoing share buyback program. The shares were bought at prices ranging from 69.4600 to 71.4000 pence, with a volume-weighted average price of 70.0400 pence. The company plans to cancel these shares, which reflects its strategy to enhance shareholder value and optimize capital structure.

More about Lloyds Banking

Lloyds Banking Group plc is a prominent financial services institution based in the United Kingdom, primarily engaged in providing a wide range of banking and financial services. The company operates in the banking sector, focusing on retail and commercial banking services, insurance, and wealth management.

data.title: Belmont Resources Announces $1.36 Million Private Placement to Bolster Exploration Efforts
data.description:
Belmont Resources ( (TSE:BEA) ) has issued an announcement.

Belmont Resources Inc. has announced a private placement to raise $1,363,500 through the issuance of 30,300,000 common shares at $0.045 each. The financing will result in three investors, HMS Bergbau AG, ERAG Energie & Rohstoff AG PCC, and LaVo Verwaltungsgesellschaft MBH, collectively becoming a Control Person by holding 37.41% of the company’s shares. The funds raised will be used for working capital, and the completion of the financing is subject to regulatory approvals. This move is significant for Belmont as it strengthens its financial position and aligns with its strategy to advance its mineral exploration projects.

More about Belmont Resources

Belmont Resources Inc. is involved in the exploration and development of a portfolio of projects focused on copper, gold, lithium, uranium, and rare earths. These projects are located in British Columbia, Saskatchewan, Washington, and Nevada. One of their key projects, the Crackingstone Uranium project, is situated in Saskatchewan’s Athabasca Basin, known for its high-grade uranium potential.

YTD Price Performance: -16.67%

Average Trading Volume: 73,204

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$2.55M

data.title: Cameco Corporation Announces 2025 Annual Shareholders Meeting
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Cameco ( (TSE:CCO) ).

Cameco Corporation has announced its 2025 annual meeting of shareholders, scheduled for May 9, 2025, to be held via live webcast from Saskatoon, Saskatchewan. Shareholders who held common shares as of March 10, 2025, are entitled to vote at the meeting, either in advance or in real-time. The company encourages shareholders to vote by proxy in advance, with the deadline for voting instructions set for May 7, 2025. This announcement highlights Cameco’s commitment to engaging with its shareholders and ensuring their participation in corporate governance.

More about Cameco

Cameco Corporation is a leading company in the uranium industry, primarily engaged in the production and sale of uranium for nuclear power plants. The company is headquartered in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, Canada, and focuses on providing energy solutions to meet global electricity needs.

data.title: MELIÁ HOTELS INTERNATIONAL Announces Shareholders’ Meeting and Leadership Appointments
data.description:
